free_text: Transfer reactions with heavy ions on light nuclei
Delta E1 and Delta E2 (typically ~50 um thick for
each) and E detector (typically ~2000 um thick)
The experimental energy resolution was in the range
of 600-900 keV, mainly due to kinematic broadening.
The uncertainties in energy calibration of peak in
spectrum were about 100 keV at low excitation
About 20% errors in absolute cross sections due to
the uncertainties  in target thickness measurements,
charge collection in the Faraday cup etc.
